text:
The user wants to compare wireless headphones under 2000 from Flipkart and Amazon, then add the cheapest one with the highest rating to the cart. I have already performed the search on Flipkart and extracted the top 3 results. I have also navigated to Amazon and performed the search.

2.  boAt Rockerz 450 Pro: Price ₹1,799, Rating 4.3
3.  Boult Audio ProBass Anchor: Price ₹1,399, Rating 4.2
